title: Resume command (Run menu)
description:
Resume command (Run menu)

Resume Command (Run Menu)
 : F7

Opens the [Resume Tasks] dialog box. Use this command to resume one or more halted tasks. This command is available only when one or more tasks are in halt mode.

Item	Description

Select
		 tasks to resume	A list
		 of all currently halted tasks. Click on one or more tasks to resume.

Resume	Click
		 to resume.

Select
		 All	Click
		 to select all of the tasks in the list.

Cancel	Cancels
		 the operation and closes the dialog.
